text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Bamboo Memory practicing her
dancing as I'm passing by the lesson rooms.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! Hmph! Hmph! Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: And take that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her methodical choreography and determined
expression are captivating. However...
choice_data_list:
That's a pretty... intense dance for such a light
song.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ngh! So the choreography really doesn't fit, huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
My dance teacher said the same thing, so I've
been trying to figure something out.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But no matter how many times I change it, it ends
up the same. I can't capture the vibe of the song...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Uggghhh! What should I do?!
choice_data_list: Relax a bit and loosen up your shoulders.
Is there anyone you could emulate?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Relax? But how?
choice_data_list: Try to think of something funny.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Something funny, huh? Something funny...
Hmmm... I mean, there should be so many things
to choose from...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bamboo Memory seems totally lost. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I cover my face with both hands and then open
them to reveal a ridiculous face!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Pfft! Hehe... What the heck kinda face is that,
Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I don't know if "like" is the right word, but...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ahahahaha! No fair, I wasn't ready! That's against
the rules!
choice_data_list: There's more where that came from!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ah! You've gotta stop! My abs can't take any
more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After having some fun and loosening up, Bamboo
Memory is finally able to match her movements to
the song.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I see! So I should copy someone first!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Oguri seems like she'd make the best
model out of everyone I know.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
She's always so naturally calm. I think she'd be a
perfect fit for this song!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I feel so at ease when I'm with her. In fact, we
usually end up doing everything at her speed—in
a good way!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
She's the same in her races too! She's so free, but
so fast... Watching her really tugs at the
heartstrings!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: When she runs like that, I... I...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hrng... Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Just thinking about her makes me want to run so
bad!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Trainer! I've got to run off all this energy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory dashes away to the training
track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not exactly what I planned, but after she
releases all her pent-up energy, she manages to
relax and dance along to the song.
